original text:
This Woman in Kenya Is Tackling Water Scarcity First Hand | Together.Stronger.
Beth Koigi, a technology and community development specialist from Kiambu County, is the CEO and founder of Majik Water. Majik Water utilizes a technology with silica gels that draw water from the air with solar energy and can currently generate 10 liters of water per day.

This Woman in Kenya Is Tackling Water Scarcity First Hand  Together.Stronger.
Beth Koigi, a technology and community development specialist from Kiambu County, is the CEO and founder of Majik Water. Majik Water utilizes a technology with silica gels that draw water from the air with solar energy and can currently generate 10 liters of water per day.
